offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month, inadequate OSHA compliance checklists cause potential fines and safety hazards. We automate checklist preparation instead of manual checklist creation and outdated templates.
problem: Ensuring OSHA compliance during site inspections
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Participate in forums for construction project management
try_it: Let users try customizable checklist templates and manual entry for site-specific notes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
